title: Extraction Result
description: Wrapper for the output of one extraction run against a single source document. Contains zero or more extracted events, plus diagnostics about the extraction process. An empty events array is a valid outcome — not every source contains extractable events.

source_id.description: Identifier of the source document that was processed.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the raw source text, used for deduplication and integrity verification.

events.description: Extracted events from this source. May be empty if no events were found.

warnings.description: Model-noted ambiguities or low-confidence flags about the extraction. These do not indicate failure but highlight areas a human reviewer should inspect.

errors.description: Structural issues the model detected in the source document (e.g. truncated text, encoding problems, contradictory information).

unparsed_fragments.description: Text fragments the model could not classify into any event type. Useful for identifying gaps in the event taxonomy.

extraction_model.description: Identifier of the model used for extraction (e.g. "claude-sonnet-4-6").

extraction_duration_ms.description: Wall-clock time in milliseconds that the extraction took.

schema_version.description: Version tag of the extraction schema used, for tracking schema evolution across runs.
